description: Bybit V5 CLI — trade, query, and manage your Bybit account from the terminal

tool_groups.description: Public market-data endpoints. No credentials required.

tools.name: market instruments
tools.description: List tradeable instruments for a category

tools.name: market mark-price-kline
tools.description: Get mark price OHLCV kline data

tools.name: market index-price-kline
tools.description: Get index price OHLCV kline data

tools.name: market premium-index-kline
tools.description: Get premium index price OHLCV kline data

tools.name: market risk-limit
tools.description: Get risk limit tiers for a symbol

tools.name: market spread
tools.description: Get current bid-ask spread and spread percentage

tool_groups.description: Order placement and management. Requires API credentials.

tools.name: trade cancel-all
tools.description: Cancel all open orders in a category

tools.name: trade batch-place
tools.description: Batch place up to 20 orders in one call

params.name: --orders
params.note: JSON array of cancel objects with symbol and orderId

tools.name: trade cancel-after
tools.description: Dead man's switch — cancel all open orders after N seconds (0 = disable)

params.name: <SECONDS>
params.note: Positional argument: seconds until cancellation (0 to disable)

tool_groups.description: Account and wallet information. Requires API credentials.

tools.name: account extended-balance
tools.description: Get extended per-coin balances across the account

tools.name: account info
tools.description: Get account information and margin mode

tools.name: account collateral-info
tools.description: Get collateral info for coins in UTA

tools.name: account greeks
tools.description: Get option greeks for UTA portfolio

tools.name: account set-margin-mode
tools.description: Set account margin mode (REGULAR_MARGIN, PORTFOLIO_MARGIN, etc.)

tools.name: account set-spot-hedging
tools.description: Enable or disable spot hedging mode

tools.name: account set-usdc-settlement
tools.description: Set USDC settlement coin for UTA (USDC or USDT)

tools.name: account volume
tools.description: Get trading volume for last N days

tool_groups.description: Position and risk management. Requires API credentials.

tools.name: position switch-mode
tools.description: Switch position mode: one-way (0) or hedge (3)

tools.name: position set-tpsl
tools.description: Set take-profit / stop-loss for an open position

tools.name: position trailing-stop
tools.description: Set a trailing stop for an open position

tools.name: position set-risk-limit
tools.description: Set risk limit tier for a position

tools.name: position add-margin
tools.description: Add or reduce margin for an isolated position

tools.name: position flatten
tools.description: EMERGENCY: Cancel all orders and close all positions in a category

tool_groups.description: Asset information, transfers, deposits, and withdrawals. Requires API credentials.

tools.name: asset coin-info
tools.description: Query coin info: networks, min/max withdraw, fees

tools.name: asset withdrawal-methods
tools.description: Show available withdrawal networks and fees for a coin (alias for coin-info)

tools.name: asset balance
tools.description: Query asset balance by account type

tools.name: asset all-balance
tools.description: Query all coin balances across account types

tools.name: asset account-balance
tools.description: Query a single coin balance for any account type

tools.name: asset transferable
tools.description: Get list of transferable coins between two account types

tools.name: asset transfer
tools.description: Transfer assets between account types on the same UID
tools.example: bybit asset transfer --coin USDT --amount 100 --from-account-type UNIFIED --to-account-type FUND

tools.name: asset sub-transfer
tools.example: bybit asset sub-transfer --coin USDT --amount 50 --from-member-id 123 --to-member-id 456 --from-account-type UNIFIED --to-account-type FUND

tools.name: asset deposit-address
tools.description: Get deposit address for a coin on a chain

tool_groups.description: Funding wallet workflows — mirrors asset group but scoped to the funding account. Requires API credentials.

tools.name: funding coin-info
tools.description: Query coin info: networks, limits, chain support

tools.name: funding balance
tools.description: Query funding balances by account type

tools.name: funding all-balance
tools.description: Query all balances across account types

tools.name: funding account-balance
tools.description: Query a single funding coin balance

tools.name: funding transferable
tools.description: List coins transferable between wallet types

tools.name: funding transfer
tools.description: Transfer funds between wallets on the same UID
tools.example: bybit funding transfer --coin USDT --amount 100 --from-account-type UNIFIED --to-account-type FUND

tools.name: funding sub-transfer
tools.example: bybit funding sub-transfer --coin USDT --amount 50 --from-member-id 123 --to-member-id 456 --from-account-type FUND --to-account-type FUND

tools.name: funding deposit-address
tools.description: Get a deposit address for a coin

tools.name: funding withdraw
tools.description: Withdraw funds to an external address

tool_groups.description: Subaccount management for master accounts. Requires master API credentials.

tools.name: subaccount list
tools.description: List up to 10k subaccounts for the master account

tools.name: subaccount list-all
tools.description: Paginated subaccount list (for masters with >10k subaccounts)

tools.name: subaccount wallet-types
tools.description: Show wallet types for master or selected sub UIDs

tools.name: subaccount api-keys
tools.description: List all API keys for a specific sub UID

tool_groups.description: Staking and savings products (Earn). Requires API credentials.

tools.name: earn history
tools.description: Get stake/redeem order history or status

tool_groups.description: WebSocket real-time streaming. Public streams need no auth; private streams require credentials.

tools.name: ws wallet
tools.description: Stream private wallet balance updates (auth required)

tools.name: ws notifications
tools.description: Stream all private notifications: orders, positions, executions, wallet

tools.name: ws lt-kline
tools.description: Stream leveraged token kline/OHLCV (spot public; LT products must exist)

tools.name: ws lt-ticker
tools.description: Stream leveraged token ticker (spot public; LT products must exist)

tools.name: ws greeks
tools.description: Stream options greeks by base coin (option public)

tool_groups.description: Futures-focused namespace for derivatives market data, trading, positions, and streaming.

tools.name: futures adl-alert
tools.description: Get ADL risk level for a futures symbol

tools.name: futures risk-limit
tools.description: Get risk limit tiers for a futures symbol

tools.name: futures set-leverage
tools.description: Set leverage for a futures symbol

tools.name: futures ws orders
tools.description: Stream private futures order updates (auth required)

tools.name: futures ws positions
tools.description: Stream private futures position updates (auth required)

tools.name: futures ws executions
tools.description: Stream private futures execution events (auth required)

tools.name: futures ws wallet
tools.description: Stream private wallet balance updates (auth required)

tool_groups.description: Simulated paper trading using live Bybit prices. No real money, no credentials required.

tools.name: paper init
tools.description: Initialize paper trading with a starting balance and fee model

tools.name: paper buy
tools.description: Simulate a buy order (market fill at live price, or limit if --price given)

tools.name: paper sell
tools.description: Simulate a sell order (market fill at live price, or limit if --price given)

tools.name: paper balance
tools.description: Show simulated coin balances (reserved and available)

tools.name: paper history
tools.description: Show paper trade history (filled trades with fees)

tools.name: paper orders
tools.description: Show open limit orders (checks for fills at current prices first)

tools.name: paper cancel
tools.description: Cancel a specific open paper limit order

params.name: <ORDER_ID>
params.note: Positional argument: order ID to cancel

tools.name: paper cancel-all
tools.description: Cancel all open paper limit orders

tools.name: paper status
tools.description: Show full account summary: balance, positions, PnL, fees

tools.name: paper reset
tools.description: Wipe all paper trading state and start fresh

tool_groups.description: Read-only account, order, transfer, and PnL histories. Requires API credentials.

tools.name: reports register-time
tools.description: Get Bybit tax API register time for the current account

tools.name: reports export-request
tools.description: Request a Bybit tax export report

tools.name: reports export-status
tools.description: Check the status of a tax export report

tools.name: reports export-retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve a tax export manifest and optionally download the files

tools.name: auth set
tools.description: Save API credentials to the platform config file

tools.name: auth sign
tools.description: Sign a test payload and print the HMAC-SHA256 signature

tools.name: auth show
tools.description: Show current credential source and masked API key

tools.name: auth permissions
tools.description: Show active permissions for the current API key

tools.name: auth reset
tools.description: Remove saved API credentials from the config file

tool_groups.description: Shell, setup, and MCP server commands.

tools.name: setup
tools.description: Interactive first-time setup wizard (credentials, default category, output format)

tools.name: shell
tools.description: Start interactive REPL shell with tab completion

tools.name: mcp
tools.description: Start MCP server for AI tool use over stdio

params.name: --allow-dangerous
params.note: Skip per-call confirmation for dangerous tools
